articles.title: Terra Classic ($LUNC) Price Surges After Adopting Proposal to ‘Re-Peg USTC’
articles.description: The price of Terra Classic ($USTC) has surged after its community approved the Terra Classic 11324 proposal to “Re-Peg USTC With LUNC,” which describes a way for the community to help $USTC’s price reattain its peg. articles.description: Shiba Inu, popularly known as the “Dogecoin Killer,” has been one cryptocurrency with a constant buzz around it in 2023. articles.title: Don’t Get Too Greedy On Bitcoin, Analyst Suggests, Here’s Why
articles.description: Bitcoin has experienced a significant trend change; the market sentiment has also changed in 2023.
